testcase.name: gameplay_smoke.regression
testcase.failure: {"primaryFailure": {"stepId": "check_logic_mismatch_probe", "category": "logic_state_mismatch", "expected": "logic state should converge to expected key/value", "actual": "check failed: CHECK_FAILED logic_state mismatch for room_clean_status", "artifacts": ["logs/driver_flow.json", "logs/godot.log", "logs/stderr.log"]}, "flowAssertions": {"total": 5, "passed": 4, "failed": 1}}
